bird.name: 小红鹳
bird.summary: 小紅鸛（學名：Phoeniconaias minor），又名小火烈鳥，是一種棲息在非洲及南亞的火烈鳥。其种加词“minor”意为“较小的”。 特徵 小紅鸛是最細小的火烈鳥，也是為數最多的，估計有達200萬隻。牠們一般重2公斤，長90厘米，高1米，翼展1米。

relations.subject: 小红鹳
relations.evidence: |title=Save the Flamingo|url= http://www.savetheflamingo.co.za/|access-date = 2008-08-20}} The population in the two key East African lakes, Lake Nakuru and Lake Bogoria, have been adversely affected in recent years by suspected heavy metal poisoning, while its primary African breeding area in Lake Natron is currently under threat by a proposed soda ash plant by Tata Chemicals. The only breeding site in South Africa, situated at Kamfers Dam, is threatened by pollution and encroaching development.{{cite news |last = Macleod|first = F
relations.object_summary: 农药、工业污染与水体污染影响食物链安全。
